title: THE JOY OF CREATION [WB]
description: this is a very heavy horror mod that always stays at night
body:
Beta-test
new version!   

All players interested in this mod, and if anything unusual happens, please report it on Discord, CurseForge, Instagram, Facebook, or YouTube to @WildBasti-Wilder. Thank you.

WARNING: Using shaders is not recommended; they cause lag. 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7H1fPT-mp54" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eae9df7cd4d76c4661a3cdf89b63f2e36ae6ada5_0.webp)

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-joy-of-creation-dweller-wb

Welcome to

[The Joy of Creation]

 a very difficult horror mod, also in beta testing. That means I'm testing what's in it, including bugs, before the big update comes out.

You simply need to comment whether something is normal or not. If something is not normal, I will take care of it before a larger, bug-free update is released.



Okay, let's get back to the point.

This horror mod is the hardest mod I have inherited to survive.



(The Ignited Freddy)
![freddy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74ef8ff3c0b9f82addab9d7ee8aa6d2752d5b09e_0.webp)

 is one of the chief animatronics.

"The Ignited Freddy" is one of the most interesting missions. It takes place in time zone 13000. Freddy appears, but time stands still. To proceed, you must shine a lamp on Freddy eleven times while he is switched off. To find out when Freddy is switched off—when he is neither moving nor speaking—you must point the lamp directly in front of him. Then something happens: Time advances by 1000 ticks until it reaches 0. But it's not that simple; Freddys are becoming increasingly rare.



(The Ignited Bonnie)
![bonnie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af4a6e25c8d66e9d9489380f0454798df65d652b_0.webp)

is one of the strongest animatronics in the club

You must pay close attention to where Bonnie comes from. If you hear three knocks, he'll come out of the door or window. As soon as Bonnie arrives, you must hide. If Bonnie sees you, you must run away or die within one minute, until Bonnie is gone.



(The Ignited Chica)
![chica](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89b094df1a3ec62282e56ac55a01b11385064d16_0.webp)

the most annoying animatronics in the club

When Chica appears with her 5 cupcakes, you must destroy all 5 cupcakes to drive Chica away. You have 1 minute 30 seconds to do this. But when the time runs out, you have to run away. Maybe you'll get lucky and can still kill the cupcakes.



(The Ignited Foxy)
![foxy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba344fa0baf576194e84baf076e3cfe8416b1165_0.webp)

is the most aggressive animatronics in the club

Be careful, Foxy is so aggressive that he will destroy doors, gates and windows if there is no light, because Foxy hates light and light is a good protection against Foxy.

(The Creation)

![creation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/332ef83cf3183411b3ad60afce7d8ee028fc20a8.png)

There are a few things to keep in mind. There's the fuse box, and then there are the fuses. You'll find the fuse box right at the beginning; it appears in random locations. As soon as you replace a fuse, it reappears nearby. There are three fuses in total. You have to be careful not to replace the fuses too late, or the creation will appear and kill you.

The secret

 is to survive all five nights to collect all five disc. Then you can create a creation disc and summon a creation boss fight.

 (The Ignited springtrap)

 ![springtrap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39ce24a6ced63428f64037e2ecd94713623d5b7e.png)

 The springtrap is rare, but it can also generate fire that can set the surrounding area ablaze. So be careful and fight it like a boss.


(The Ignited Golden Freddy)

![goldenfreddy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcc658088925a7b8593d726c2652cbdc705bddc7_0.webp)

 ?don't look at me?



(Endo B Angel)

![endo B angel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73b1758c146baebd89f0d76115b68373178dab04.png)

?don't look away?



(Endo C Mouth)

![endo c mouth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e16877e32a00494289c5d9d80c08a24be9778335.png)

?don't go too close?



(Endo F Red)

![endo F red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/067f66ff50ac321ea7679dc1055d4e224d5cb914.png)

?don't stand still?



(Endo R Blue)

![endo R blue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b25c75a4badc1304e392afc71184f77ff0d70ea.png)

?it's time to kill you?



good luck to play

info

to creater
